### Highlights | 更新内容

- 新增可配置的串流快捷键，可单独调整 Moonlight 专用串流操作，同时保留 `⌘W`、`⌃⌘F` 等系统快捷键的既有行为。
  Added configurable Moonlight-specific stream shortcuts while keeping built-in macOS shortcuts like `⌘W` and `⌃⌘F` behaving normally.
- 新增卡片式快捷键入口与录制弹窗，可直接按下新组合键录入，并支持一键恢复默认值。
  Added card-style shortcut entries and a recorder sheet so users can press a new combo directly and restore defaults with one click.
- 为自定义快捷键增加冲突校验，避免重复分配、系统保留组合键冲突，以及低修饰键组合带来的误触风险。
  Added validation to block duplicates, reserved system combos, and risky low-modifier assignments.
- 串流窗口菜单与运行时操作现在会同步跟随自定义快捷键更新，设置后的行为更加一致。
  Updated runtime handling and stream window menu items to follow configured shortcuts consistently.
- README 与发布模板补充了首次启动、Gatekeeper 绕过和快捷键说明，为后续版本沿用统一的发布结构打好基础。
  Updated the README and release template with first-launch, Gatekeeper, and shortcut guidance so future releases can reuse the same structure.
